name: Fritatta (Sep, 96)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup green olives, seeded and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions in olive oil until soft.
2. Stir in garlic and bell peppers, cook for 3 minutes.
3. Stir in diced tomatoes, olives, and seasonings. Cook a few minutes to reduce liquid.
4. Whisk eggs. Stir in cheese, salt, and pepper.
5. Stir filling into eggs.
6. Grease a baking dish or Pyrex.
7. Pour egg mixture into the dish.
8. Bake in a 350°F oven for 20 to 25 minutes.
9. Serve sliced at room temperature.
